perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair and cherry-shaped hair clips, wearing a blue and white striped shirt with a navy sweater-scarf, faces the camera. She begins a skincare routine, applying serum and facial pads while talking expressively. (2) As the video progresses, she transitions into a makeup routine, applying foundation with a sponge, eyebrow gel, and eye shadow. Her facial expressions vary from frustration to amusement as she recounts a story. (3) She applies a white lifting patch to her neck and uses a hair curler on her bangs. Finally, she holds up a bottle of BIOHEAL BOH serum and makes a peace sign to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins speaking in Mandarin. (2) The soundscape includes Foley effects like the clicking of product lids, the spray of a mist bottle, and the soft tapping of a makeup sponge. (3) A deep, exaggerated male voice periodically interrupts to act out dialogue from the 'ex-boyfriend' character. The female voice maintains a storytelling tone, shifting from indignation to humor as she mentions specific brands like OliveYoung.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '渣男前男友居然說台灣女生都很懶😂' (Scumbag ex-boyfriend actually said Taiwan girls are all lazy). (2) Functional Text: '韓國渣男故事' (Korean scumbag story). (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '超大問號' (Big question mark), '犀牛?' (Rhino?), and various brand names like 'BIOHEAL BOH' and 'OliveYoung' appearing with promotional hooks.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Storytelling integrated with Skincare/Makeup demo -> Product endorsement -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing a routine
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman, long brown hair, wearing a striped shirt and cherry hair clips, expressive facial gestures.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A neutral, well-lit indoor setting with a light-colored paneled wall or closet doors.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting, even and flattering.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video leverages a personal 'scumbag story' about a Korean ex-boyfriend to capture attention through gossip and relatability, while simultaneously demonstrating and endorsing BIOHEAL BOH skincare products. The narrative is structured to keep viewers engaged with the drama of the story while visually proving the effectiveness/routine of the beauty products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of BIOHEAL BOH products, mention of OliveYoung ranking, and a call-to-action regarding a group buy.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Storytelling while doing makeup/skincare, cherry hair clips.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: High production value with beat-synced editing and effective use of 'rage-bait' storytelling to promote commercial products.
